purpose: Three-task local smoke test for a complete outer-loop -> inner-loop -> outer-loop cycle.

selection_policy.primary_rule: Use tasks already run across all seven schemas with clean completed pair results.
selection_policy.secondary_rule: Prefer faster/simple tasks while retaining at least one non-saturated task with useful optimization signal.

excluded_fast_candidate.reason: Fast and stable, but every observed schema scored 100, so it contributes little outer-loop learning signal.

tasks.selection_note: Stable, fast, and simple methodology-guardrail task.
Stable, fast, and has a clear artifact/data comparison contract.
Still completed cleanly, but provides non-saturated score signal for outer-loop updates.
